title: Setting Up Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA / TOTP)
text:
Q: How do I set up multi-factor authentication (MFA) using TOTP?
A: To set up multi-factor authentication (MFA) using Time-based One-Time Password (TOTP), follow these steps:

Step 1: Open your preferred web browser and navigate to the company login page.

Step 2: Log in with your company credentials (username and password).

Step 3: Once logged in, go to your account settings or security settings. This is usually found in the profile menu.

Step 4: Look for the option labeled 'Multi-Factor Authentication' or 'Two-Factor Authentication' and select it.

Step 5: Choose the option to set up TOTP. You will be presented with a QR code.

Step 6: 
Windows: Download and install a TOTP authenticator app such as Microsoft Authenticator, Google Authenticator, or Authy from the Microsoft Store.
macOS: Download and install a TOTP authenticator app such as Microsoft Authenticator, Google Authenticator, or Authy from the Mac App Store.

Step 7: Open the authenticator app and select the option to add a new account. Use the app to scan the QR code displayed on your screen.

Step 8: After scanning, the app will generate a time-based code. Enter this code back on the company login page to verify your setup.

Step 9: Once verified, MFA is successfully set up. Make sure to save any backup codes provided in case you lose access to your authenticator app.
